evals.prompt: Please QA the Health.md CLI after a change to the iPhone export request flow. I want the quick checks first, and only then a live-device checklist.
evals.expected_output: Runs or proposes layered checks in order: macOS build, iOS build, sync protocol tests, CLI help/status syntax, Mac control smoke, then live E2E prerequisites and commands.

evals.prompt: I ran status and iphone.can_trigger_exports is false. Build me a concise investigation plan that won't disturb user settings unless needed.
evals.expected_output: Investigates readiness fields in order: iPhone connection, capability support, destination selected/writable, active_export, and gives human-action steps without unnecessary settings changes.

evals.prompt: Verify the raw Health.md CLI export path: it should return JSON records and not write files, even when no Mac destination folder is selected.
evals.expected_output: Defines prerequisites, runs bounded status/raw export commands, checks raw_data records and files_written: 0, verifies no destination files are created, and documents when live device validation cannot be completed.
